results.title: Karishma Shaik
highlights:
AI/ML Engineer | Building Generative AI, LLM & RAG Systems | Production AI on AWS & GCP
...
Generative AI Engineer at [Best Buy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/best-buy)
...
Generative AI Engineer and AI/ML Research Engineer with 5+ years of experience building production-grade LLM systems, RAG pipelines, and Agentic AI workflows across financial services, automotive, and enterprise environments. Currently at Best Buy, I architect enterprise RAG pipelines using LangChain, FAISS, and OpenAI GPT-4, and design multi-agent workflows with LangGraph and CrewAI that scaled synthetic data generation from 15 to 24,000 samples per day (1,600x improvement). I own the full model lifecycle from fine-tuning (PEFT/LoRA, RLHF) to production deployment on AWS and Azure. At Toyota North America, I led AI product delivery across NLP, Computer Vision, ASR, and Reinforcement Learning. Reduced deployment time by 35%, cut regression incidents by 45%, and improved model accuracy by 30%. At Genpact, I built an OpenAI LLM solution for financial document review and fraud detection that eliminated 70% of manual effort for a Fortune 500 client with 99.9% pipeline reliability. I also have published 2 peer-reviewed international papers on deep learning and NLP, and developed the I2FELM algorithm for imbalanced financial data classification. CORE EXPERTISE Generative AI: RAG Pipelines, Agentic AI, LangChain, LangGraph, CrewAI, vLLM LLMs: OpenAI GPT-4, Anthropic Claude, Gemini, Llama 2/3, BERT, HuggingFace ML/DL: PyTorch, TensorFlow, Keras, Scikit-learn, NLP, Computer Vision, RL Cloud: AWS (SageMaker, Bedrock) | Azure (OpenAI Service, AI Search) | GCP (Vertex AI) MLOps: MLflow, Airflow, Databricks, Docker, Kubernetes, GitHub Actions, Terraform Data: PySpark, Snowflake, PostgreSQL, Redis, OpenSearch, Kafka, dbt M.S. Computer and Information Science, GPA 3.9 | Azure AI Engineer (AI-102) Open to full-time Generative AI, AI/ML Engineering, and AI Research roles in the US. Irving, TX based | Open to: Remote | Hybrid | Onsite | Full-Time W2 | Contract W2 | C2C | Contract-to-Hire Reach me at: krishshaik7@gmail.com #GenerativeAI #LLM #RAG #AgenticAI #LangChain #PyTorch #MLOps #AWS #Azure #NLP #OpenAI #AIEngineering #OpenToWork #W2 #C2C #ContractToHire #LLMEngineer #MachineLearning
...

- Developed scalable backend AI services using Python, FastAPI, and Docker; deployed on Kubernetes clusters to support production-grade AI features and real-time inference.

...

results.title: Nickolas G.
highlights:
Principal Data Scientist | Causal Inference & Machine Learning for Strategic Decision-Making | Systems Thinker & Mentor
...
Lead Data Scientist at [Best Buy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/best-buy)
...
As a Lead Data Scientist at Best Buy, I bridge advanced analytics and real-world impact. My work focuses on causal inference, machine learning, and econometrics to guide high-stakes decisions in areas like demand forecasting, marketing strategy, and supply chain resilience. I thrive at the intersection of technical depth and strategic relevance, designing modular, interpretable models that capture the nuances of consumer behavior, market dynamics, and organizational complexity. Whether I’m building long-horizon forecasts or experimentation pipelines, my goal is to enable data-driven strategies that are not only efficient, but resilient—especially in turbulent economic and policy environments. My foundation in physics, mathematics, and computer science is paired with a systems-thinking mindset, allowing me to synthesize insights across domains—from game theory to social choice—to support smarter collective decisions. I’m especially passionate about: - Designing causal modeling frameworks that go beyond surface-level correlations - Driving cross-functional alignment between data science and strategic planning - Mentoring the next generation of data scientists with empathy and intellectual rigor I'm especially interested in connecting with people who are thinking deeply about how to bring analytical rigor into real-world complexity—those who are shaping strategy, growing resilient teams, or advancing the role of data science in organizational decision-making. Whether through collaboration, conversation, or shared curiosity, I’m always looking to learn from others who are working at the intersection of analytics, leadership, and long-term impact.
...

highlights:
Chief AI Transformation Officer, Best Buy | Founder, TriFlow.ai
...
Chief AI Transformation Officer at [Best Buy](https://www.linkedin.com/company/best-buy)
...
I run product for Best Buy's digital commerce experiences: homepage through checkout, search, PDPs, pricing and deals, payments, the mobile apps, and the agentic commerce work reshaping how customers find and buy technology. My teams operate in partnership with Design and Engineering. My career started as a Blue Shirt at Best Buy stores 413 and 225, then moved through Amazon (Sports and Outdoors vendor management), eBay (seven years across vertical strategy, SEO, and the View Item experience), Nike (a $1.5B digital marketing transformation, plus personalization and experimentation), and Coursera (product leadership across a 150M+ learner platform). Coming back to Best Buy as VP in 2025 was a full-circle decision, and the problems in front of us, particularly around how AI is reshaping both retail and product management itself, are the most interesting I've had a shot at. Separately, I'm the founder of TriFlow.ai, an adaptive product development platform focused on the gap between what PMs spec and what actually ships. I write about agentic commerce, build vs buy in an era of collapsing build costs, web performance as a P&L lever, and where product management goes when the constraint shifts from execution to judgment. I keep my hands on the keyboard (Cloudflare Workers, Obsidian plugins, a home lab), which keeps technical conversations honest.
...
#### Chief AI Transformation Officer (Current)
...
Lead AI strategy, delivery, and transformation for Best Buy end to end: the AI portfolio we build directly, AI investments owned by other business leaders, and partnerships across frontier models and their providers.
...
Lead product for Best Buy's digital commerce experiences end to end: homepage, search, PDPs, pricing and deals, payments, mobile apps, and conversational commerce. Current focus areas: Agentic commerce strategy across native checkout partnerships (OpenAI, Google, Wizard) and internal conversational shopping surfaces (Ask Blue, Blue Assist). SWIFT, the web performance program targeting Core Web Vitals across GHP, PDP, and PLP. Search unification, consolidating architectures and embedding diagnostic data science into the program. Building an agentic leadership function that pairs product, applied AI, and operations to ship at the velocity AI now permits.
...
Led product for a global edtech platform serving 150M+ learners. Owned strategy and execution across discovery, learner habit formation, and AI/ML personalization. Partnered
...
with the executive

growth in the

early integration of LLM-based features into the learning

“I had the pleasure of working closely with Jeffrey Prachick during our time at Best Buy, where I was a Senior Machine Learning Scientist and he was a Senior Data Analyst. We collaborated on several high-impact Generative AI projects, including a large-scale review distillation system and an AI generated question-answering system for thousands of products.
...
Jeff's role was absolutely critical to the success of these initiatives. His ability to perform deep analysis on massive customer datasets provided the foundational insights that guided our model development. Furthermore, he played an indispensable role in validating the outputs of our Large Language Models. His meticulous work ensured the accuracy and relevance of generated review summaries and answers, which was essential for maintaining product quality and customer trust.
...
Beyond his technical skills, Jeff is an exceptional collaborator. He was instrumental in bridging the gap between data analysis and machine learning, helping our team move these complex projects from prototype to full-scale production. He is a sharp, dedicated, and results-oriented. Jeff would be a tremendous asset to any data-focused team, and I recommend him without hesitation.”
...
“I have had the pleasure of working with Jeff since he started on our team as an intern analyzing all things user generated content over five years ago. Through the years Jeff has played a key role on our team as the go to guy for processing, analyzing and reporting across several complex data sets within user generated content, product detail page and generative AI. Our partnership over the last few years on several generative AI projects was my favorite though. Jeff was key to validating across multiple prompts, data sets and user scenarios before we published the data; as well as monitoring how well the data helped customers make a purchase decision after it was published. All in all, Jeff is a great partner with a noticeable passion for data.”

results.title: Senior AI Scientist | Hirequorum
highlights:
Senior AI Scientist | Hirequorum
...
# Senior AI Scientist
...
As the Senior AI Scientist, you will work alongside industry experts developing and applying cutting edge ML & AI algorithms to optimize Best Buy customer experience. The systems you build will power customer experiences responsible for billions of dollars in revenues from home page, search, recommendations to checkout and post-purchase. You will work in a dynamic team tackling a variety of use cases including understanding search intent, intelligently optimizing the page layout, deciding what products to be shown in carousels, trading off between giving customers what they want vs allowing for serendipity, etc. You will work alongside a fast-paced team enabling ideas to often go into production in a matter of weeks.
...
### What you’ll do
...
- Design and implement large-scale Search, RecSys, Personalization and Adtech systems that power customer experiences across Best Buy surfaces.
- Derive complex features from large scale clickstream logs for model training data
- Develop & finetune retrieval/ranking models using supervised learning, deep learning, LLMs, and generative AI (e.g., Two Tower models, Sequence models, GNNs, etc.)
- Design custom evaluation metrics for measuring quality of ML and GenAI models.
- Collaborate with AI engineers, platform and product teams to deploy low latency models.
...
- Bachelor's degree in a highly quantitative field (Computer Science, Engineering, Physics, Math, Operations Research or related) or equivalent experience
- Strong machine learning and algorithmic background with a deep understanding of supervised and unsupervised learning methods, deep learning, LLMs.
- 4 years of experience building ML and/or AI driven products or other similar related functions (e.g. software engineering, data science, advanced analytics). Advanced degrees in relevant fields may be counted towards experience requirements.
- 2 years experience working on industrial-grade Search, RecSys, Personalization or Adtech.
- Strong skills in SQL and at least 1 programming language (e.g., Python, Julia)
...
### Preferred qualifications
...
- Master's degree or Ph.D in a highly quantitative field (Computer Science, Engineering, Physics, Math, Operations Research or related)
- Experience building production grade ML models using one or more Deep Learning frameworks like TensorFlow, Keras, PyTorch, etc.
- Cross-functional experience in deploying realtime low-latency ML products over GCP or AWS
...
Corporate, Data and Analytics

# Principal Machine Learning Engineer- LLM Fine-tuning and Optimization
...
Machine Learning and Artificial Intelligence are at the heart of the Airbnb product. From Trust to Payments, and from Customer Service to Marketing we rely on ML to ensure that guests and hosts have the best possible experience with Airbnb.
...
The CS AI product team is responsible for driving CSxAI (Customer Support x Artificial Intelligence) initiatives by adopting the Generative AI technologies to enable an intelligent, scalable and exceptional service experience. The team develops and enhances various AI models, ML services and tools including LLM fine-tuning, alignment and optimization, RAG/Search, LLM evaluation and testing automation, feedback-based learning and guardrail for a wide range of applications in Airbnb.
...
As a principal machine learning engineer, you will be responsible for fine-tuning state-of-the-art LLMs for diverse use cases while optimizing models for high-performance deployment on Airbnb’s ML Infrastructure. You will partner with product managers, software engineers, data scientists and operation teams to brainstorm, design and develop AI products such as AI Assistant, Autonomous agent, recommendation, travel planning, and many more products that make meaningful impacts in the world of travel.
...

...
- Continuously evaluate recent and upcoming large foundational models, ensuring the selection and refinement of the highest quality models for enhanced performance and efficiency.
...
- Hands-on prototype, develop and productionize LLM models and pipelines at scale, including both batch and real-time use cases.
...
- Drive key AI architectural decisions for products, and contribute to Airbnb’s ML platform architecture and strategy.
...

...
- PhD in Computer Science, Machine Learning, Mathematics, Statistics, or related technical field.
...
- 10+ years of experience with developing machine learning models and products at scale from inception to business impact.
...
- Programming experience in Python and hands-on experience with frameworks such as PyTorch.
...

...

...
- Or specialized experience in runtime optimizations, model quantization, compression, on-device inference, GPU inference, pytorch, kernel development
...

...
- PhD in AI, machine learning, data science, or related technical fields.

...

## Job description
...
Google's software engineers develop the next-generation technologies that change how billions of users connect, explore, and interact with information and one another. Our products need to handle information at massive scale, and extend well beyond web search. We're looking for engineers who bring fresh ideas from all areas, including information retrieval, distributed computing, large-scale system design, networking and data storage, security, artificial intelligence, natural language processing, UI design and mobile; the list goes on and is growing every day. As a software engineer, you will work on a specific project critical to Google’s needs with opportunities to switch teams and projects as you and our fast-paced business grow and evolve. We need our engineers to be versatile, display leadership qualities and be enthusiastic to take on new problems across the full-stack as we continue to push technology forward.
...
As a Software Engineer on the Shopping Ads team, you will be an "AI First" engineer dedicated to solving complex issues using Generative AI . You will design, implement, and launch innovative Large Language Model (LLM) and Machine Learning (ML) systems to enhance the shopping journey for users worldwide.

highlights:
Optum Hiring Data Scientist | Jobformore
...
# Data Scientist
...
Optum is seeking a Data Science professional who is passionate about applying machine learning, Generative AI, and Large Language Models (LLMs) to solve complex healthcare problems on a scale. Imagine working with massive volumes of healthcare data spanning clinical, claims, behavioral, and digital interactions – powering intelligent personalization, discovery, and decision support for millions of members, providers, and care teams.
...
At Optum, the Data Science mission is to transform healthcare data into robust, scalable AI solutions, including LLM based and Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) systems that combine enterprise knowledge with advanced language models to deliver accurate, contextual, and trustworthy insights. These solutions help uncover deep usage patterns, member journeys, and care signals that inform and continuously evolve Optum’s digital products, clinical platforms, and healthcare services.
...
Your work will directly influence how healthcare consumers engage with digital experiences, how clinicians access timely insights, and how business and care strategies are shaped through data. By joining Optum’s data science team, you will be part of an exciting journey to build advanced ML and GenAI driven products, grounded in responsible AI principles, that operate at enterprise scale and create meaningful impact across the healthcare ecosystem.
...
- Design, develop, and deploy advanced analytics, machine learning, and Generative AI solutions to address complex healthcare and business problems using largescale structured and unstructured data
...
- Applies advanced techniques including statistics, machine learning, simulation, and mathematical modelling
...
- Build and optimize LLM based applications, including Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) frameworks, to enable accurate, context aware, and explainable insights from enterprise healthcare data sources such as clinical notes, claims, provider data, and policy documents
...
- Develop, evaluate, and finetune machine learning and GenAI models, including prompt engineering, retrieval strategies, and model evaluation techniques to improve accuracy, relevance, and performance
...
- Translate complex analytical and GenAI outputs into clear, actionable insights for business stakeholders, product teams, and
...
- Support prototyping, validation, and deployment of GenAI and ML solutions, working with engineering teams to ensure solutions are scalable, secure, and maintainable. Continuously stay current with advancements in LLMs, GenAI frameworks, and healthcare AI trends, contributing innovative ideas and improvements to Optum’s capabilities
...
### Required Qualifications:
...
- Bachelor’s Degree
...
- 4+ years of experience in handling/active development in data science projects
...
- 4+ years of experience in Microsoft Azure Cloud, Databricks, Mlflow, Spark SQL & Python
...
- Experience using Machine Learning Algorithms: Linear & Logistic Regression, Time Series analysis, Support Vector Machine, K-Means clustering, K-Nearest Neighbors Decision Trees, Random Forest, Naive Bayes, PCA, SVD, Artificial Neural Networks, Association Rules, Genetic Algorithm, Optimization, Bagging and Boosting algorithms etc.
...
- Understanding of data, schema, data model, machine learning and how to bring efficiency in big data related life cycle
...
- Proven skills to create opportunities using machine learning or artificial intelligence
...
Optum, part of UnitedHealth Group, is a global health services and technology company revolutionizing healthcare delivery through data analytics, pharmacy benefits, and digital health solutions that connect millions to better care. Headquartered in Eden Prairie, Minnesota, Optum serves patients, providers, payers, and pharmacies worldwide with innovative platforms for care optimization, claims processing, and population health management.

Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development | Wfhforgeon

# Experienced Data Scientist – AI/Machine Learning Developer – Generative AI Platform Development
...
Join arenaflex, and you'll be part of a team that's changing the world one innovation at a time. We are currently seeking a talented and passionate Data Scientist to join our Cloud Technologies Application Platform team and help us build the future of developer experience through cutting-edge artificial intelligence solutions.
...
Are you ready to take your career to the next level with a company that values innovation and excellence? arenaflex is looking for an experienced Data Scientist to join our dynamic team as an AI/Machine Learning Developer. In this role, you will be instrumental in designing and executing our artificial intelligence strategy to elevate our developer experience platform to unprecedented heights.
...
This is a unique opportunity to work at the forefront of generative AI technology, collaborating with multidisciplinary teams to develop innovative solutions that will transform how developers create applications at arenaflex. You'll leverage your expertise in machine learning, deep learning, and large language models to solve complex business challenges and drive measurable impact across the organization.
...
As a Data Scientist at arenaflex, you will be responsible for driving our AI initiatives and contributing to the development of next-generation developer tools. Your key responsibilities will include:
...
Design, develop, and implement machine learning models and algorithms that enhance our developer experience platform, ensuring alignment with arenaflex's overall technology strategy.
...
Build, train, and fine-tune machine learning models, including foundation models and large language models, to address various business problems and improve developer productivity.
...
Choose appropriate machine learning algorithms, train models, and calibrate hyperparameters to achieve optimal predictive performance and model accuracy.
...
Apply deep expertise in transformer architecture, vector embeddings, and advanced ML techniques to develop solutions that solve complex business challenges.
...
Lead model deployment for experimentation, implementing A/B testing, monitoring model performance, and iterating on solutions based on empirical results.
...
Work closely with AI engineers, software developers, product managers, and other data scientists to deliver end-to-end AI-enabled solutions.
...
Bachelor's degree in Data Science, Computer Science, Statistics, Mathematics, or a
...
field. A Master's degree is strongly preferred and will be given special consideration.
...
Minimum of 5+ years of progressive experience in the software industry with a focused specialization in machine learning and artificial intelligence.
...
Strong understanding and extensive experience with cutting-edge machine learning algorithms, deep learning architectures, statistical modeling, and large language models.
...
- Advanced degree (Master's or PhD) in Data Science, Computer Science, or related field

- Experience applying machine learning techniques specifically in developer productivity or software development lifecycle contexts

- Knowledge of cloud platforms and infrastructure (AWS, Azure, or Google Cloud)

- Familiarity with MLOps practices and deployment pipelines

- Published research or contributions to open-source machine learning projects

- Experience with prompt engineering and LLM optimization techniques
...
If you are passionate about artificial intelligence, machine learning, and want to work on projects that will shape the future of technology, arenaflex is the place for you. We are looking for individuals who bring enthusiasm, dedication, and fresh perspectives to their work – people who are ready to push boundaries and achieve extraordinary results.
